# Matt & Alison's Wedding

> Official wedding website for Matt and Alison's January 18, 2027 celebration in Mesa, Arizona.

## Public pages

- [Wedding details](https://matt-alison.com/): Date, venue, schedule, travel guidance, and other public wedding information.
- [Our story](https://matt-alison.com/our-story): How Matt and Alison met and their story together.
- [Registry](https://matt-alison.com/registry): Current registry and gift information.
- [SMS updates](https://matt-alison.com/sms-updates): Voluntary enrollment for wedding logistics and schedule text updates.
- [Terms](https://matt-alison.com/terms): Terms for the website and SMS updates.
- [Privacy](https://matt-alison.com/privacy): Privacy information for the website and SMS updates.

## Contact

For questions about the wedding website, email [contact@matt-alison.com](mailto:contact@matt-alison.com).

## Access notes

The RSVP flow is private and invite-code protected. The admin dashboard and API are not public content and are intentionally omitted from this file.
